title: Pending Approval Inbox & Autopilot Brief Integration
description: User-facing Pending Approval inbox for autopilot matches. Morning brief surfaces overnight finds. Complete the agentic loop: discover → score → prep → user approves → track in pipeline.

userStories.title: Pending Approval inbox page
userStories.description: Page /inbox/pending with usePendingOpportunities hook. Cards show match score, cover letter copy, resume tips with disclaimer. Approve/Dismiss actions. Nav badge for pending count.

userStories.title: Approve flow — application draft without auto-apply
userStories.description: Approve creates application stage To Apply, source autopilot, persists cover_letter_draft. Redirect to dashboard detail panel. Toast: 'Added to pipeline — apply when ready'.

userStories.title: Morning brief autopilot section integration
userStories.description: build_morning_brief pending_approvals section with top 3 matches. summary_line: 'I found {n} great matches overnight'. Links to /inbox/pending.

userStories.title: Autopilot settings and onboarding copy
userStories.description: SettingsAutopilotSection: toggles, min score 70-95, max daily. Explainer: 'We never submit for you.' Dashboard banner if no resume uploaded.
